g.text: Language Generation separated from Behavioral State
NARRATIVE LAYER — LLM dialogue generation, persuasion, rhetoric, framing
Agent speaks: 'This proposal leaves substantial value on the table.'
STRATEGIC LAYER — Multi-turn plans, subgoal decomposition, tracking
COGNITIVE LAYER — Emotions, modulation, hybrid urgency, confidence
SOCIAL PHYSICS — 6-dim state vectors, deterministic delta updates
RELATIONSHIP LAYER — NxN matrix, pairwise trust, coalitions, secrets
PROCEDURAL LAYER — Event sourcing, scheduler, bidding, floor control
